summary: Created card for truthful pod VRAM/RAM in the status-bar memory monitor. The monitor currently polls local /system/stats even while a RunPod Pod is connected, which is misleading.
Picked up MPI-98 for investigation + implementation. Scope: add a real remote stats source first, then switch the monitor to Pod usage while connected.

Implemented first pass: new GET /remote/pod/stats telemetry route in remoteProxy.js plus MpiMemoryMonitor source-switching via remote:connection. Remote mode now avoids silently showing local stats; when live Pod telemetry is unavailable it renders explicit Pod N/A instead. node --check clean for routes/remoteProxy.js and MpiMemoryMonitor.js.

Truthful Pod RAM/VRAM live-verified on L4 (v0.4.4/0.2.7). /wrapper/stats cgroup-v1 RAM + nvidia-smi VRAM; RAM 0.7 idle->22.6 load, matches console. taesd previews crisp. Cosmetic bar-total-uses-spec left as backlog.
Archived from done to tasks/_archived/MPI-98 (mpi-archive cleanup of oldest completed cards).
